user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a list of confirmation approvers showing group ID, location, approver(s) and applicability, so that I can see who approves employee confirmations
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Confirmation Approvers screen; When the page loads; Then a list of approvers is displayed with Exit Approvers Group ID, Location Id, Approver(s) and Applicability columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new confirmation approver, so that I can define who is responsible for approving confirmations
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Confirmation Approvers screen; When I click Add new confirmation approver and provide the details; Then the new approver is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search and filter approvers by Location, Department and Position level, so that I can quickly find relevant approver configurations
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Confirmation Approvers screen; When I select filter criteria and click Search; Then only approvers matching the criteria are shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can start a new search from a clean state
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the Confirmation Approvers screen; When I click Reset; Then all filters are cleared and the full list is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view and edit an existing approver entry, so that I can maintain accurate approval rules
acceptance_criteria: Given an approver is listed; When I click View or Edit on that row; Then I can review or modify the approver's details and save changes
